title: Scroll bars need rounded ends
excerpt: The scroll bars (both horizontal and vertical) would be more intuitive if the medium gray portion had rounded ends like a regular browser scroll bar. Then, I could easily be cued to grab this portion to scroll. Right now…

posts.author: melissa1234 (melissa@schmittcreative.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
The scroll bars (both horizontal and vertical) would be more intuitive if the medium gray portion had rounded ends like a regular browser scroll bar. Then, I could easily be cued to grab this portion to scroll. Right now, I often grab the white portion which then jumps me far down the page. Didn’t realize how important this visual cue was, but for me, turns out it is!

I’m using Monday.com in Chrome on a mac.
